name: The Day I Loved You
overview: Eli gets suspended for vandalizing school properties. At the guidance counselor’s office, he meets Nikko, the straight A student who’s feisty and assertive. From two different clocks, they get the surprise of their lives when they learned they have to dance together… at the school prom.

trailers.title: THE DAY I LOVED YOU Official Trailer | Premieres April 26 on Regal Entertainment Channel
